g.text: The line of the high priests
David set them over the song in Yahweh’s
house, after the ark came to rest there
· the singer, a Kohathite — his line:
· his brother, at his right hand — his…
· of Merari, on the left hand — his line:
their brothers the Levites were appointed
for all the service of God’s tabernacle
The sons of Aaron and their charge
Cities of the sons of Aaron

svg.text: verse 44 — On the left hand their brothers the sons of Merari: Ethan the son of Kishi, the son of Abdi, the son of…
each line reads downward: the son of, the son of …
